faqs.question: How can I apply for admission?
faqs.answer: You can apply online through the university’s official website by filling out the application form and submitting the required documents.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission?
faqs.answer: Eligibility varies by programme. Generally, undergraduate programmes require completion of Class 12, while postgraduate programmes require a relevant bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate.

faqs.question: Does K.R. Mangalam University have an entrance exam for admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University conducts its own entrance exam - K.R. Mangalam Entrance Exam (KREE).

faqs.question: Can I apply for multiple programmes?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply for more than one programme, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: What documents are required during admission?
faqs.answer: Typically, you need academic certificates, ID proof, passport-sized photographs, and any relevant entrance exam scores (as required).

faqs.question: What is the application fee for admission at KRMU?
faqs.answer: The application fee is Rs 1,000 which can be paid during the application process.

faqs.question: When does the admission process begin?
faqs.answer: Admissions usually begin in the first half of the year. The exact dates are announced on KRMU’s official website.

faqs.question: Can international students apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university welcomes international students, subject to eligibility and visa requirements.

faqs.question: Is there a counselling process?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university conducts dedicated counselling and interaction rounds prior to admissions, offering students personalised guidance on programme selection, career pathways, and the overall academic experience. .

faqs.question: How will I know if selected?
faqs.answer: You will receive confirmation via email or admission portal.

faqs.question: When can I apply for UG, PG, and PhD programmes?
faqs.answer: Applications are open now! Apply online at: https://admissions.krmangalam.edu.in/.

faqs.question: Can I apply to multiple programmes?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can choose up to 3 programmes on one application form. Alternatively, submit separate applications for more programmes (application fee applies per form). Note: Don’t apply twice for the same programme in the same year.

faqs.question: Can I apply before my Class 12 results are declared?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer provisional admission based on your expected marks. Submit your official marksheet for verification before the session starts.

faqs.question: Does KRMU accept lateral entry students?
faqs.answer: Yes! Learn more about the eligibility criteria for lateral entry here.

faqs.question: How much is the application fee?
faqs.answer: The application fee is Rs 1000.

faqs.question: How do I apply and what documents are needed?
faqs.answer: Apply online and attach the scanned copies of your qualifying exam documents. Selection is based on the entrance exam KREE, faculty-led interview, and document verification. Start your application here.

faqs.question: Are there any diploma courses available at the university?
faqs.answer: Yes, K.R. Mangalam University offers diploma courses to cater to diverse interests and career aspirations. We currently have a Diploma in Pharmacy programme structured to provide practical and theoretical knowledge, ensuring students are well-prepared for their respective fields.

faqs.question: Does K.R. Mangalam University have an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: The University has formed its own entrance exam K.R. Mangalam Entrance Exam (KREE).

faqs.question: Does KRMU offer sports quota admissions and scholarships?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer both. Learn more about our scholarship policy and sports quota admissions [Click here]  (if applicable).

faqs.question: What are the Admission Office hours?
faqs.answer: The office is open from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure?
faqs.answer: To be considered for admission, you must submit the online application, take the KREE entrance exam, and attend a faculty-led interview. You will be selected based on your KREE score, interview performance, and document verification.

faqs.question: Can I get a loan to finance my education?
faqs.answer: Yes! We partner with several banks and financial institutions like IDFC Bank, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, Propelled, and GrayQuest to provide loan options for our students. Click here to know more.

faqs.question: What programmes are offered at the university?
faqs.answer: The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes across 11 disciplines, which include Engineering & Technology, Management & Commerce, Architecture & Design, Basic & Applied Sciences, Medical & Allied Sciences, Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation Sciences, Legal Studies, Liberal Arts, Education, Agricultural Sciences and Emerging Media & Creator Economy.

faqs.question: Are industry-oriented courses available?
faqs.answer: Yes, many programmes are designed in collaboration with industry experts to ensure practical relevance.

faqs.question: Can I switch my course after admission?
faqs.answer: Course changes may be allowed under certain conditions and within a specific timeframe.

faqs.question: Are interdisciplinary programmes available?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers programmes that combine multiple disciplines.

faqs.question: What is the duration of undergraduate programmes?
faqs.answer: Most undergraduate programmes are of 3–4 years’ duration.

faqs.question: Are there honours or research options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both Honours and Honours with Research options.

faqs.question: Do programmes include internships?
faqs.answer: Many programmes include internships as part of the curriculum.

faqs.question: Are there elective subjects available?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can choose electives based on their interests.

faqs.question: Are guest lectures and workshops part of the course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the KRMU organises frequent expert sessions, industry talks, and technical workshops.

faqs.question: Are online courses available at K.R. Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: No, the university doesn’t offer any online courses.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure?
faqs.answer: Fees vary depending on the programme. Detailed fee structures are available on KRMU’s website's Admission page.

faqs.question: Are scholarships available?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers merit-based and need-based scholarships up to 27 crore.

faqs.question: How can I apply for a scholarship?
faqs.answer: Scholarship applications can be submitted during the admission time. Get in touch with our admission counsellors for more detail on this.

faqs.question: Are there any early-bird discounts?
faqs.answer: Occasionally, the university offers early admission benefits. Keep checking KRMU’s Fee page regularly for updates on discounts.

faqs.question: Can fees be paid in installments?
faqs.answer: Yes, the fee payment can be made in installments, in accordance with the university’s prescribed schedule.

faqs.question: Are education loans supported at K.R. Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university assists students in availing education loans through partner banks and fintech firms.

faqs.question: Are there scholarships for sports or extracurricular achievements?
faqs.answer: Yes, students with exceptional achievements in sports are eligible for scholarships, in accordance with the university’s policies.

faqs.question: Does the fee include hostel, transport, and other facilities?
faqs.answer: No, the mentioned fee covers tuition only. Charges for hostel, transport, and other facilities are separate and are not included in the tuition fee.

faqs.question: Who all are eligible for scholarships?
faqs.answer:
K.R. Mangalam University offers scholarships for:
■ SUPER ACHIEVERS
■ ALUMNI (K.R. MANGALAM SCHOOLS)
■ SPORTS ACHIEVERS
■ CUET/ JEE/ CAT/ MAT & other Competitive Exams’ SCORES
■ CHILDREN OF DEFENCE PERSONNEL
■ FACULTY/ STAFF MEMBER CONCESSION
■ SHERO FOR FEMALE STUDENTS

faqs.question: Do international students have a different fee structure?
faqs.answer: Yes, fees may differ for international students.

faqs.question: Does the university provide placement support?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a dedicated placement cell, we offer 100% placement support to our students.

faqs.question: What companies visit for placements?
faqs.answer: Every year, top companies from various industries participate in campus placements.

faqs.question: Are internships mandatory?
faqs.answer: Many programmes include mandatory internships.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package?
faqs.answer: The average placement package at KRMU is Rs 7.5 LPA.

faqs.question: Are students trained for placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, our dedicated placement cell provides comprehensive training to prepare students for placement interviews. This includes aptitude tests, mock interviews, soft skills development, and personalised guidance.

faqs.question: Can students apply for off-campus placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can apply for off-campus opportunities.

faqs.question: Are international placements available?
faqs.answer: Yes, international placement opportunities may be available depending on the programme.

faqs.question: Does the university provide career counselling?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer career guidance and mentorship to our students.

faqs.question: What’s the highest package offered at the university?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at KRMU is Rs 56.6 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the internship stipend range?
faqs.answer: Stipends vary widely depending on company and role.

faqs.question: Does the university provide hostel facilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers well-maintained and secure hostel facilities, with separate accommodations for boys and girls.

faqs.question: What facilities are available on campus?
faqs.answer: The campus is equipped with a wide range of modern facilities, including well-stocked libraries, advanced laboratories, garden, messes, gym, sports grounds and courts, common rooms, and multiple cafeterias to support a comfortable and enriching student experience.

faqs.question: Are there student clubs and societies?
faqs.answer: Yes, there are various clubs for cultural, technical, and social activities.

faqs.question: Is Wi-Fi available on campus?
faqs.answer: Yes, the whole university campus is Wi-Fi enabled.

faqs.question: Are sports facilities available?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university encourages sports and fitness activities.

faqs.question: Is transportation provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university provides transport facilities for students, with routes covering all parts of the Delhi NCR region to ensure safe and convenient commuting.

faqs.question: Are medical facilities available?
faqs.answer: Basic medical facilities and support are available on campus.

faqs.question: Is the campus safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, the campus is equipped with robust security measures, including 24×7 security personnel and comprehensive CCTV surveillance to ensure a safe and secure environment for all students.

faqs.question: Are there events and festivals?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university hosts a wide range of cultural and academic events throughout the year.

faqs.question: Are there dining options on campus?
faqs.answer: Yes, multiple food outlets, messes and cafeterias are available on campus.

faqs.question: How are exams conducted?
faqs.answer: Exams are conducted semester-wise.

faqs.question: What is the evaluation system?
faqs.answer: Evaluation includes internal assessments and end-term exams.

faqs.question: How can I check my results?
faqs.answer: Results are available on the student portal.

faqs.question: What is the grading system?
faqs.answer: The university follows a credit-based grading system.

faqs.question: Can I apply for re-evaluation?
faqs.answer: Yes, re-evaluation options are available.

faqs.question: Are supplementary exams conducted?
faqs.answer: Yes, supplementary exams conducted for students who need to reappear.

faqs.question: What is the attendance requirement?
faqs.answer: Students must meet minimum attendance criteria.

faqs.question: Are practical exams included?
faqs.answer: Yes, practical exams are included, depending on the programme.

faqs.question: Can I take the exam via online mode?
faqs.answer: No, the examination is conducted strictly in offline mode. Candidates are required to be physically present to appear for the exam.

faqs.question: When are results declared?
faqs.answer: Results are typically declared after each semester.

faqs.question: Does the university have an alumni network?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university boasts a strong and dynamic alumni network of over 18,000 members across diverse industries.

faqs.question: How can students connect with alumni?
faqs.answer: Students can connect with alumni through events, social media platforms, and mentorship programmes.

faqs.question: How can alumni stay connected with the university?
faqs.answer: Alumni can stay connected through the official alumni portal, social media groups, newsletters, and by participating in university-led events and initiatives.

faqs.question: Does the university organise alumni meet-ups or events?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university regularly organises alumni meets, reunions, webinars, and networking events to help alumni reconnect and engage with the community.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of joining the alumni network?
faqs.answer: The alumni network offers opportunities for professional networking, career support, mentorship, industry connections, and participation in exclusive alumni events.

faqs.question: How can I become a part of the K.R. Mangalam University alumni network?
faqs.answer: All graduates automatically become members of the alumni network. You can also register through the university’s alumni portal to stay connected and updated.

faqs.question: Is there an alumni portal?
faqs.answer: Yes, a platform exists for alumni engagement.

faqs.question: How can alumni contribute to the university’s growth?
faqs.answer: Alumni can contribute by mentoring students, participating in events, offering internships, facilitating placements, and sharing their professional experiences.

faqs.question: Does the university highlight alumni achievements?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university regularly showcases alumni success stories and achievements through its website, newsletters, and social media platforms.

faqs.question: Can alumni update their professional details with the university?
faqs.answer: Yes, alumni are encouraged to regularly update their professional information through the alumni portal to stay engaged and receive relevant updates and opportunities.

faqs.question: How does the alumni network help in professional networking?
faqs.answer: The alumni network connects graduates across industries, enabling knowledge sharing, collaborations, and valuable professional connections.

faqs.question: Are alumni eligible to participate in campus events and activities?
faqs.answer: Yes, alumni are often invited to participate in university events, seminars, cultural programmes, and networking sessions.
